title: Tome III Act 8: The Naming of the Unnamed

story.text:
# 📖 Tome III Act 8: The Naming of the Unnamed
**act** · shared · narrative

C54 — Φ-adjacency: φ-adjacent vertices carry adjacency through the gap rather than through the Hamming-1 edge structure.
